branch.conclusion: Use Python AST path. Walk FunctionDef/AsyncFunctionDef/ClassDef. Apply r3-dedup-overlapping. Emit metadata-rich chunks.
Fallback to generic line splitter. Log warning {file, language, reason} and mark chunks `fallback=true`.

branch.question: Is tree-sitter for that language installed?

branch.conclusion: Use tree-sitter. Walk function_declaration / class_declaration / arrow_function. Apply r3-dedup-overlapping.
Block production rollout. Install tree-sitter; regex fallback is unsafe for any TS with decorators/generics.
Use generic line splitter. Log warning. Treat chunks as best-effort.

example.p: app/views.py with valid syntax → AST path → 3 method chunks after dedup → indexed under strategy=ast version=1.0.0.
